creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text: compat4x seems to have extra logic to, as I assume, coexist with compat3x, which has(d) two libraries with the same versions. However there's no more compat3x, so this logic seems to not be needed anymore. This also fixes stage-qa. The port is unmaintained, but I'd like a quick review from portmgr or newer compat?x maintainer.
